'''rasolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psaltress|psaltress]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psaltress|psaltress]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rasolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræseleth|ræseleth]] || [[word:ræselej|ræselej]] || [[word:ræselesh|ræselesh]] || [[word:ræsele|ræsele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rasosoloth|rasosoloth]] || [[word:rasosoloj|rasosoloj]] || [[word:rasosolosh|rasosolosh]] || [[word:rasosolo|rasosolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rasoloth|rasoloth]] || [[word:rasoloj|rasoloj]] || [[word:rasolosh|rasolosh]] || [[word:rasolo|rasolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rasofloth|rasofloth]] || [[word:rasofloj|rasofloj]] || [[word:rasoflosh|rasoflosh]] || [[word:rasoflof|rasoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rasolotho|rasolotho]] || [[word:rasolojo|rasolojo]] || [[word:rasolosho|rasolosho]] || [[word:rasoloko|rasoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rasoloth|rasoloth]] || [[word:rasoloj|rasoloj]] || [[word:rasolosh|rasolosh]] || [[word:rasolo|rasolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rasolothol|rasolothol]] || [[word:rasolojol|rasolojol]] || [[word:rasoloshol|rasoloshol]] || [[word:rasolokol|rasolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rasolothotho|rasolothotho]] || [[word:rasolojojo|rasolojojo]] || [[word:rasoloshosho|rasoloshosho]] || [[word:rasoloko|rasoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rasolothon|rasolothon]] || [[word:rasolojon|rasolojon]] || [[word:rasoloshon|rasoloshon]] || [[word:rasolokon|rasolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rasolothoro|rasolothoro]] || [[word:rasolojoro|rasolojoro]] || [[word:rasoloshoro|rasoloshoro]] || [[word:rasolokoro|rasolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
